ops.text: Truncate long file names in Explorer FileRow by applying weight boundaries and Ellipsis overflow

ops.replace_with:
Icon(file.icon, null, tint = file.color, modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp))
        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(15.dp))
        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
            Text(
                text = file.name, 
                color = Color.White, 
                fontSize = 14.sp,
                maxLines = 1,
                overflow = androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextOverflow.Ellipsis
            )
            Text(
                text = file.meta, 
                color = Color.Gray, 
                fontSize = 11.sp,
                maxLines = 1,
                overflow = androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextOverflow.Ellipsis
            )
        }

ops.text: Remove the bottom TabRow navigation bar to reclaim vertical screen space
Fix variable redeclarations, missing isSearching state, and scope errors in ExplorerScreen
Remove orphaned onSearch block and fix when-statement syntax in ConduitUI
Fix overlapping Header and Content by wrapping Dashboard in a Column
Remove the stray closing brace at the end of ExplorerScreen
